item_specifications.special_feature: Chew Resistant, Non Skid Bottom, Removable Cover, Scratch Resistant
item_specifications.material: Ballistic Rip-Stop, Polyester, Polyurethane Foam, Recycled Fiberfill

about_item: Durable Ripstop Ballistic Cover: The heavy-duty cover will withstand scratching, digging, and occasional mouthing. Great for dogs that like to get a little rough with their beds!

Bolster Donut Design: The raised pillow wall turns the bed into a cozy, calming corner den and offers your pup a comfy place to rest their head or curl up against. The open front of the den allows easy entry for shorter dogs or older pups with limited mobility. Each bolster wall section is filled to a plump thickness with 100% recycled polyester fiberfill for optimal support.

USA-Made: The pillow style bed pad is made from CertiPUR-US certified shredded foam manufactured in the USA. This is a dense but soft pad that allows your dog to sink down into their den. Perfect for any pups (big or small!) that like to nest and snuggle into their beds.

Hassle-Free Clean: The densely-woven cover is naturally fur, dirt, and stain resistant. The tight weave also limits the absorption of common allergens, making it hypoallergenic and easy to wipe down. It has a zipper closure tucked away at the front of the inner cushion for quick removal and is machine washable.

Two Fabric Styles: Regular ripstop (Black) and Premium Finish ripstop (Taupe and Titanium). Both are durable; the regular ripstop has a slick, canvas-like tactical texture that is great for outdoor and indoor beds alike, while the premium finish ripstop has a softer texture that will do best when kept indoors.

features.title: Original Ripstop
features.text: Our original covers are made from 1200D ripstop ballistic fabric. It has a smooth, slick texture that fur and dirt won't stick to. Good both indoors and outside.

features.title: Premium Finish
features.text: This is our original ripstop ballistic fabric, but with a faux-woven coating that makes it a bit softer to the touch. Fur and dirt can stick more easily, so it should be used indoors only.

features.title: Cushion Liner
features.text: The bottom bed cushion is protected by a 600D ripstop ballistic fabric liner. It's much more durable than a standard bed liner and guards against wear and tear.

product_description.title: grey and black australian shepherd lounging in grey bolster bed outside

authors_reviews.title: Finally a bed that can keep up with our Rottweilers!
authors_reviews.text: As a Rottweiler family, we’ve gone through our fair share of beds—most don’t last more than a few weeks with big, playful pups like ours. We decided to give the K9 Ballistics Tough Oval Bolster Bed a try, and it’s been a total game-changer.First off, the ripstop ballistic cover is amazing. Our Rottie loves to dig before settling in, and this fabric actually holds up. It’s not chew-proof, but it resists scratching and everyday messes better than anything else we’ve tried.The oval bolster design is perfect for Rotties. Ours loves to lean against the raised edge or rest her big blocky head on it—it gives her that secure, nest-like feeling she craves.Inside, the shredded foam fill is supportive yet soft. Our girl sinks in just enough to get comfy, but the bed still holds its shape. She’s a serious napper, and this has become her go-to spot.From a practical side, we love that the cover zips off easily for washing. Between muddy paws and shedding, that feature alone is worth it. Plus, the non-slip bottom keeps the bed in place, even when she comes charging through the house with zoomies.Overall, this bed is tough, comfortable, and clearly built with dogs like ours in mind. If you’ve got a Rottweiler (or any large, energetic pup), this is hands-down one of the best beds out there. Highly recommend!— The Lonepeak Rottweilers Family
authors_reviews.author: Lonepeak Rottweilers

authors_reviews.title: Buy it now!
authors_reviews.text: My Rottweiler Banks is absolutely obsessed with this bed. It’s super cozy, supportive, and the bolster sides make it feel like his own snug little spot. We’ve gotten him other beds in the past and he’s destroyed them within a day, but this one is built so well and it’s chew resistant. The tough design is amazing, plus it’s waterproof which makes cleaning so easy.I also love the anti-skid bottom because the bed stays in place even when Banks hops on with all his excitement. It’s durable, comfortable, and seeing him so happy and relaxed makes me glad we found the perfect bed for him. If you’re thinking of buying it, do it — you won’t regret it!
authors_reviews.author: Melissa

product.size: Medium (37" L x 30" W x 11” H)

authors_reviews.title: The 'Dubbs' Rule Applies: A Canine Commotion
authors_reviews.text: If you grew up in the 70s, you understand the sacred law of 'Dubbs.' This product has successfully introduced that vintage brand of sibling rivalry to my three Border Collies. It is the ultimate seat of power in our home. The hierarchy is constantly challenged by our six-month-old puppy, who has mastered the art of the 'sneak-in' the second a sibling stands up.Watching them navigate this competitive comfort is a testament to the product’s allure. It’s durable enough to handle the frantic energy of a puppy instigator and appealing enough to keep two adult dogs constantly on the lookout for an opening. A rare five-star find that keeps the whole pack engaged.
authors_reviews.author: Mark

product.size: Large (47" L x 38" W x 13” H)

authors_reviews.title: Dogs chewed holes easily
authors_reviews.text: It’s a nope. The bed is attractive and the dog liked it. Unfortunately it’s not as chew-proof as one might expect. Dog chewed holes in the mattress, got all the little foam bits out all over the place. K-9 did honor their promise and sent me a credit for a replacement mattress… but the dog ate that one too.
authors_reviews.author: Pam Stanton

product.size: Large (47" L x 38" W x 13” H)

authors_reviews.title: Top quality
authors_reviews.text: My English Staffordshire tore up his generic bed easily. But NOT K9 Ballistics. He loves his new bed ! Great product and worth every cent.
authors_reviews.author: Monica Vorn

product.size: Medium (37" L x 30" W x 11” H)

authors_reviews.title: If you dog is tough on beds these are great
authors_reviews.text: I wanted to wait a few months to write a review to make sure these beds truly stood the test of time. I have bought many beds for my dogs and no matter how many times they say they are scratch resistant they never are. Within months I am picking up memory foam or fluff all over my living room floor, then throwing the beds away. This was my final shot. While theses beds were a bit expensive they were worth it. My dogs love them. They are burrows and scratcher which is common for their breeds. They are able to burrow, scratch, and snuggle without a care in the world. So far these beds remain scratch resistant, showing no wear and still look nice.
authors_reviews.author: Gina

product.size: Medium (37" L x 30" W x 11” H)

authors_reviews.title: Not so stuff and fluff made for a real dog
authors_reviews.text: OMG. This bed is tough, really tough not a fuzzy fluffy wears out easy bed. My dog loves it. He has never tried to chew it . It large enough he can sleep or play or lay in it to chew his favorite bone. It is a bit complicated to take apart and put together because the fabric has little give. I spray it down with a plant base deoderizer and disinfectant.
authors_reviews.author: Jodie Anderle
